name: Unsupported hole sizes
description: Flag drilled hole DIAMETERS that fall outside the fab's supported drill-size range. This check inspects drill artwork and cannot detect blind/buried/special hole TYPES (that requires stackup/layer-span data, not present in flat drill files).
what_it_measures: Count of drilled hole diameters smaller or larger than the supported min/max drill size for this fabrication process.
